title: Lifesteal Low Fire
description: The LifeSteal Low Fire texture pack removes the tall, distracting fire effect in Minecraft and replaces it with a low, unobtrusive flame.
body:
# LifeSteal Low Fire
This texture pack removes the tall, distracting fire effect when you're on fire, giving you a clearer view in PvP and Survival without changing the game’s vanilla feel. It’s especially popular among **LifeSteal SMP players** for its simplicity and competitive advantage.
I created this version fully by myself to make sure it stays clean, lightweight, and perfect for PvP or everyday gameplay.

## Compatibility
- Tested on: 1.21.11 – 1.19 (Main version: 1.21+)
- Other versions: Not tested

## Requirements
- **No mods required**. Works on vanilla Minecraft.

## Credits
- Pack created by **[_Melted](https://modrinth.com/user/_Melted)**.
- Inspired by **LifeSteal SMP players**.
